concepts.headline: Anthropic's European revenue grew 9x YoY.
concepts.subtext: Europe is now Anthropic's fastest growing region, with a new hub opening in Milan.
concepts.layout_description: Left anchored hero pattern. The '9x' stat dominates the left two-thirds at large display size in DM Mono. Subtext below in secondary color. Particle network in upper right quadrant at low opacity. FLYWHEEL watermark behind content. Warm accent bar at top of canvas fades right.

layout_spec.headline_position: left at 72px from left, 40% from top
layout_spec.accent_placement: top edge horizontal bar, 2px, fades right
layout_spec.whitespace_distribution: 55% right canvas empty with particle motif, 20% top, 15% bottom

concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, stat numeral #000000, subtext #6b7a7c, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #000000 at 0.06 opacity, FLYWHEEL watermark #000000 at 0.03 opacity
concepts.reasoning: The 9x figure is the single most compelling fact in the post. A stat callout isolates it with maximum typographic weight, letting the number do the work. Editorial restraint is preserved by keeping supporting text minimal and pushing decorative elements to the periphery.
visualization_goals: Show Anthropic's 9x year-over-year revenue growth in Europe compared to other regions
Map Anthropic's expanding European office network across London, Dublin, Zurich, Paris, Munich, and Milan
Illustrate Europe's position as Anthropic's fastest-growing region relative to global operations
Highlight the timeline of Anthropic's European expansion leading up to the Milan office opening

concepts.headline: Anthropic now has six European hubs.
concepts.subtext: From London to Milan, Anthropic's European footprint is accelerating fast.
concepts.layout_description: Stacked list pattern. Heading anchored top-left with generous top padding. Six city items listed vertically below with square number markers in DM Mono. Right half of canvas holds a subtle particle network. FLYWHEEL watermark centered behind content at near-zero opacity. Warm gradient footer at bottom 80px.

layout_spec.headline_position: top-left at 72px from left, 72px from top
layout_spec.accent_placement: left edge vertical bar 2px tall, warm sand color
layout_spec.whitespace_distribution: 50% right side empty with particle dots, 15% top, 15% bottom

concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #000000, list items #000000, number markers #6b7a7c in DM Mono, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #000000 at 0.07 opacity, watermark #000000 at 0.025 opacity
concepts.reasoning: The six-city list is concrete, scannable, and tells a geographic expansion story in one glance. The stacked list modality with square number markers aligns with Flywheel's Swiss-design precision, and the warm off-white background adds editorial warmth.
visualization_goals: Show Anthropic's 9x year-over-year revenue growth in Europe compared to other regions
Map Anthropic's expanding European office network across London, Dublin, Zurich, Paris, Munich, and Milan
Illustrate Europe's position as Anthropic's fastest-growing region relative to global operations
Highlight the timeline of Anthropic's European expansion leading up to the Milan office opening

concepts.headline: Anthropic is doubling down on Europe.
concepts.subtext: Revenue up 9x year over year. New offices in Milan join London, Dublin, Zurich, Paris, and Munich.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement variant with left-weighted text. Headline at large display size anchored left. Thin warm accent bar separates headline from subtext. Particle network drifts through upper right. FLYWHEEL watermark sits behind at extreme size and low opacity. Clean, confident, minimal.

layout_spec.headline_position: left at 72px, vertically centered slightly above midpoint
layout_spec.accent_placement: horizontal divider bar below headline, 2px, 120px wide, warm sand
layout_spec.whitespace_distribution: 60% canvas is negative space, particle cluster upper-right

concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, headline #000000 weight 600, subtext #6b7a7c weight 400, accent bar #d7c8af, FLYWHEEL watermark #000000 at 0.03 opacity, particle dots #000000 at 0.06 opacity
concepts.reasoning: When the story is both qualitative and quantitative, a headline plus subtext card synthesizes both in a single confident statement. The restrained layout communicates authority through simplicity, which is core to Flywheel's editorial identity.
visualization_goals: Show Anthropic's 9x year-over-year revenue growth in Europe compared to other regions
Map Anthropic's expanding European office network across London, Dublin, Zurich, Paris, Munich, and Milan
Illustrate Europe's position as Anthropic's fastest-growing region relative to global operations
Highlight the timeline of Anthropic's European expansion leading up to the Milan office opening

selection_reasoning: The stat callout best embodies Flywheel's editorial identity: one number, maximum typographic weight, everything else subordinate. The 9x figure is the undisputed hook of the post and deserves to be the entire visual message. It communicates scale and momentum in a single glance, with negative space and the particle motif doing the atmospheric work around it. The other concepts are strong but more verbose; the stat callout is the most confident and visually decisive choice.
